title: Research
description: Output of Stage 1 (Research) and Stage 2 (Source Verification). Contains all verified facts, source metadata, and verification status. Consumed by story.json generation. The facts array is the authoritative source of truth for all claims in the project.

stage_produced.description: 1 = draft from Stage 1; 2 = verified from Stage 2. Stage 2 overwrites Stage 1.

summary.description: Prose summary in the project language. Written in target language. Used as context for story generation.

facts.description: Ordered list of verified facts. Each fact is independently sourced and rated.

sources.description: All sources consulted during research. Facts reference sources by source_id.

timeline.description: Chronological events. Optional but required for history/documentary projects.

key_entities.description: Named entities (people, organizations, locations) that appear in the script.

unresolved_questions.description: Questions that remain open after research. Included in documentation, not script.

cultural_context.description: Cultural background notes. Required if project.niche starts with 'japanese_'. Consumed by japan_template.

verification_status.description: Overall verification verdict. PASS = all facts verified. NEEDS_REVISION = flags present but no fails. FAIL = one or more facts failed verification.

flag_count.description: Number of facts with status=flag. Must equal count of facts where status=flag.

fail_count.description: Number of facts with status=fail. If > 0, verification_status must be FAIL.

pipeline_continue.description: True if pipeline may proceed. False if fail_count > 0. NEEDS_REVISION allows continue.

source_report_notes.description: Director notes from Stage 2 source verification. Human-readable summary of decisions.

fact_id.description: Unique within project. Format: VF1, VF2... VF99.

claim.description: The fact as it will be used in the script. In target language.

status.description: verified = confirmed by ≥1 high-quality source. flag = true but language adjustment needed. disputed = competing claims from credible sources. unverified = cannot confirm with available sources. fail = demonstrably false.

flag_reason.description: Required when status=flag. Explains what needs adjustment.

flag_adjustment.description: Required when status=flag. The exact language change to apply in the script.

dispute_summary.description: Required when status=disputed. Summarizes both sides of the dispute.

source_ids.description: References to sources array by source_id.

script_usage.description: How this fact may be used in script generation.

script_note.description: Optional note for the script writer about how to handle this fact.

url.description: Live URL if publicly accessible. Null if not available online.

perspective_note.description: Notes on inherent perspective or potential bias of this source.

year.description: Year as integer, or approximate string like '1887頃'.

era_label.description: Japanese era name + year if applicable.

fact_ids.description: Which facts support this timeline entry.

name_reading.description: Pronunciation in target language (e.g. furigana for Japanese).

examples.summary: 端島（はしま）は長崎県長崎市の沖合に位置する小さな無人島。三菱が運営した炭鉱島として約84年間にわたり人が住み続け、1959年には人口密度が世界最高水準のひとつに達した。

facts.claim: 端島（はしま）は、長崎県長崎市に属する無人島。別名「軍艦島（ぐんかんじま）」は、海上から見た島の外観が軍艦に似ているとされることに由来する。
1916年（大正5年）に建設された「30号棟」は、日本最古級の鉄筋コンクリート造集合住宅のひとつとされている。
facts.flag_reason: 「最古」の定義・比較対象によって記述が異なる。
facts.flag_adjustment: 「最古」→「最古級のひとつ」と表現すること。
facts.script_note: スクリプトでは「最古級の鉄筋コンクリート造集合住宅のひとつ」と表現すること。

sources.name: UNESCO World Heritage List — Sites of Japan's Meiji Industrial Revolution (ID 1484)

timeline.event: 端島での石炭採掘開始

key_entities.name: 三菱合資会社
key_entities.name_reading: みつびしごうしかいしゃ
key_entities.role: 1890年より島の採掘権を持ち、島全体を管理・運営

unresolved_questions: 戦時中に端島で労働した朝鮮人・中国人の正確な人数および死者数は確定していない。
examples.cultural_context: 端島は単なる廃墟ではない。高度経済成長期の光と影を体現する場所である。
examples.source_report_notes: FLAG 3件、DISPUTED 1件。いずれもスクリプト表現の調整で対応可能。FAIL なし。パイプライン続行承認。
